user.title: History Editor
user.description: This component allows editing history records and statistics from the database.

get_records.name: Get history records
get_records.description: Retrieve history records for an entity from the database.

update_record.name: Update history record
update_record.description: Update an existing history record in the database.

delete_record.name: Delete history record
delete_record.description: Delete a history record from the database.

create_record.name: Create history record
create_record.description: Create a new history record in the database.

recalculate_statistics.name: Recalculate statistics
recalculate_statistics.description: Force recalculation of short-term and/or long-term statistics for an entity over a given time range.

bulk_update_record.name: Bulk update history records
bulk_update_record.description: Apply the same field overrides to multiple state history records in a single transaction.

bulk_delete_record.name: Bulk delete history records
bulk_delete_record.description: Delete multiple state history records in a single transaction.

bulk_update_statistic.name: Bulk update statistics
bulk_update_statistic.description: Apply the same column overrides to multiple statistics rows.

bulk_delete_statistic.name: Bulk delete statistics
bulk_delete_statistic.description: Neutralize multiple statistics rows by overwriting them with the previous period's values.
